creator: pgiffuni@fps.biblos.unal.edu.co
text:
This update of the FElt port solves some problems in FElt. I also added
examples and corrected a small typo in the PLIST (oops I don't see that fixed
the update, better check: it was a problem with the directory
$(PREFIX)/share/felt).

Fix: -DISTNAME=	felt-3.01
+DISTNAME=	felt-3.02
 CATEGORIES=	cad
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www-cse.ucsd.edu/users/atkinson/FElt/Binaries/ \
-		ftp://lucy.ifi.unibas.ch/unix/general/
+		ftp://ftp.isd.uni-stuttgart.de/pub/src/FEM/FElt/
 EXTRACT_SUFX=	.src.tar.gz

 MAINTAINER=	pgiffuni@FPS.biblos.unal.edu.co

-WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/FElt-3.00
+WRKSRC=         ${WRKDIR}/FElt-3.02
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
 MAN1=		burlap.1 corduroy.1 felt.1 patchwork.1 velvet.1 yardstick.1
 MAN3=		Drawing.3
 MAN4=		corduroy.4 felt.4

-#DOCS= 		ftp://cs.ucsd.edu/pub/felt/felt-3.00.ps.gz
+#DOCS= 		ftp://cs.ucsd.edu/pub/felt/felt-3.02.ps.gz

 post-patch:
 	${RM} -f $(WRKSRC)/lib/Geompack/*.c
+post-install:
+	$(MKDIR) $(PREFIX)/examples/FElt
+	$(CP) $(WRKSRC)/examples/* $(PREFIX)/examples/FElt

 .include <bsd.port.mk>
! 3d specific defaults

 ! !*shapeStyle:					Rectangle
-! !*control*spacer.height:				80
+! !*control*spacer.height:				43
 ! !*control*MenuButton*height:			26
 ! !*control*Command*height:			26
---- 908,914 ----
+--- 1046,1052 ----

   ! 3d specific defaults

 ! *shapeStyle:					Rectangle
-! *control*spacer.height:				80
+! *control*spacer.height:				43
 ! *control*MenuButton*height:			26
 ! *control*Command*height:			26
-+ #ifdef __FreeBSD__
-+ #include <floatingpoint.h>
+  # ifndef _ALLOCATE_H
+  # define _ALLOCATE_H
++ #ifdef __STDC__
++ #include <stdlib.h>
++ #else
+  # include <malloc.h>
 + #endif
+  # include <string.h>

-  static char *defaults [ ] = {
-  # include "velvet.ad.h"
-***************
-*** 595,600 ****
---- 598,608 ----
-      static String  output_buttons [ ]  = {"dismiss", "save"};
-      static String  proceed_buttons [ ] = {"okay", "cancel"};
-      static String  qsave_buttons [ ]   = {"yes", "no", "cancel"};
-+
-+ #ifdef __FreeBSD__
-+   fpsetmask (0);
-+ #endif
-+
-
-
-      /* Parse the initial command line options */
+  # define New(type) \
How-To-Repeat: The update follows
